theme.toggle_requirement: Mandatory accessible toggle switch for recruiter preference

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold

typography.pairing_archetype: The 'Developer UI' - Mono Headings with Sterile Sans Body for an engineering-first, factual feel.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on dark mode to eliminate digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px delicate inner stroke on cards. Use border-collapse for technical grids.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl with explicit borders. Never use pure transparent backgrounds for text-bearing overlays.

grids_and_layouts.spacing_system: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-16 for main sections. Internal padding in bordered containers must be p-6 or p-8.

grid_modes.bento_marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 with asymmetric spans.
grid_modes.dense_data: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 for timeline, research, and credential cards.

grids_and_layouts.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, dense content. Mobile-first grids. Grid items must be direct children.

components.navigation: Visible navbar with Brand Name + key links (Home, Projects, Research, Contact). Sticky with backdrop-blur-xl.
components.hero_section: Recruiter-focused, zero fluff. Highlight Machine Learning, Climate Intelligence, IoT Telemetry, Environmental Data Analytics. Left aligned.
components.project_cards: Exactly two flagship projects (Rainfall Monitoring, SKD Learning Platform). Cardless sharp edges or max 8px border-radius.
components.research_center: Dense bento grid layout to showcase verified factual content, publications, or research outcomes.
components.contact_form: FastAPI + Resend integration without message storage. Uses customized shadcn/ui form elements.
components.component_libraries: lucide-react for icons. shadcn/ui primitives. Framer Motion for animations.

motion.philosophy: Restrained motion. Focus on micro-interactions over decorative flourishes.
rules: Must implement prefers-reduced-motion media query logic.
Use opacity and subtle transforms (-translate-y-1) for hovers.
No universal transitions (avoid 'transition-all'). Target specific properties.

accessibility.contrast: APCA and WCAG AA compliant. Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text.
accessibility.focus_states: High contrast ring focus (e.g., focus:ring-2 focus:ring-cyan-500).
accessibility.testing: All interactive/key elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., 'contact-submit-button').

images.description: Abstract data graph analytics network background
Heavy rain water droplets on dark surface
Dark blue close-up of a high-tech circuit board

media.image_constraints: Mobile height max 80vh. Do not use generic placeholders. Use provided images or workspace evidence only.

rules: Create redirect logic mapping legacy /portofolio to /portfolio.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard React (.jsx/.js) files. DO NOT use TypeScript (.tsx/.ts).
Implement the recruiter-focused layout first: high density, clear facts, no fluff.
Implement shadcn/ui carefully without standardizing the 'Vercel look' entirely. Modify borders to fit the Navy/Cyan dark tech aesthetic.
Enforce exactly two flagship projects constraint.
Integrate FastAPI with Resend for the contact form, ensuring it does NOT persist messages.
Ensure 'data-testid' is attached to all buttons, links, and forms.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge to 'AI slop'. Use deep contrasts, sharp elements, and purposeful asymmetry.
Never use dark colors as gradients.
Do not center-align app containers (no '.App { text-align: center; }').
Never use emoji characters for icons. Stick to lucide-react.
Omit any unavailable section entirely. Never show placeholder data or 'Coming soon'.
